heroSubtitle: A centralized platform to request, track, and approve time off — replacing spreadsheets and emails with transparency and compliance.
featuresSubtitle: Built for teams of 300 to 20,000+ employees across departments.
feature1Desc: Support for Sick, Vacation, Personal, Maternity/Paternity, Unpaid leave, public holidays, WFH, and business trips.
feature2Desc: Automatic calculation of available days based on employee tenure or monthly accrual rules.
feature3Desc: Sync approved leaves with Outlook, Google Calendar, Slack, or any calendar system.
feature4Desc: Instant alerts when more than 5 team members request the same dates — avoid staffing gaps.
feature5Desc: Automated email and push notifications for every status update — no manual follow-ups.
feature6Desc: Exportable CSV/PDF reports for department administrators and HR at any time.
howSubtitle: Three simple steps to streamline your leave management.
how1Desc: Employees submit leave requests through the portal with date range and leave type.
how2Desc: Managers see team availability, conflict alerts, and approve or reject in under 3 clicks.
how3Desc: Everyone stays informed with real-time notifications and exportable reports.
ctaTitle: Ready to Modernize Your Leave Management?
ctaSubtitle: Join companies that trust Leave Planner for transparent and compliant time-off tracking.
